chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 654 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 30.08.2023 Since filing of this petition on 05.04.2021, petitioner and his Counsel have not pursued it. Even today, they are absent without any intimation. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
